release_notes: Chromium bundle SxS layout fixed — chrome.exe's embedded manifest references the bare Chrome version as a SxS assembly, our pack-script was putting everything flat and Windows failed with ERROR_SXS_CANT_GEN_ACTCTX → spawn UNKNOWN at chrome:launch / probe. New bundle 148.0.7778.178-tomeanty.4 packs root + version-subfolder layout. Plus 7 cosmetic bugs: MB→Мб, stray dot separator before ETA, picker «Открываю…» state, «никогда» visible during row hover, «простой»→«—», warning when custom binary lives inside managed engine tree, size context stays visible during extract/finalize.
